member.name: T:PreparedArtifactPaths.PreparedArtifactPathsReader
member.summary: Reads prepared artifact path handoff files generated by the burn scripts.

member.name: F:PreparedArtifactPaths.PreparedArtifactPathsReader.RfpLatestFileName
member.summary: RFP handoff file for the latest RFP run.

member.name: F:PreparedArtifactPaths.PreparedArtifactPathsReader.TconFileName
member.summary: TCON handoff file generated by RedCase_Auto.

member.name: F:PreparedArtifactPaths.PreparedArtifactPathsReader.TddiFileName
member.summary: TDDI handoff file generated by flash_run.bat.

member.name: M:PreparedArtifactPaths.PreparedArtifactPathsReader.ReadPaths(System.String)
member.summary: Reads non-empty, trimmed paths from any prepared artifact path file.

member.name: M:PreparedArtifactPaths.PreparedArtifactPathsReader.ReadFile(System.String)
member.summary: Reads the first non-empty path from any prepared artifact path file.

member.name: M:PreparedArtifactPaths.PreparedArtifactPathsReader.ReadJoined(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Reads paths and joins them into one scalar string.

member.name: M:PreparedArtifactPaths.PreparedArtifactPathsReader.GetRfpLatestFilePath(System.String)
member.summary: Builds the RFP latest-run handoff file path.

member.name: M:PreparedArtifactPaths.PreparedArtifactPathsReader.GetRfpFilePath(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Builds the RFP project-specific handoff file path.

member.name: M:PreparedArtifactPaths.PreparedArtifactPathsReader.ReadRfpPaths(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Reads paths for a specific RFP project.

member.name: M:PreparedArtifactPaths.PreparedArtifactPathsReader.ReadRfpJoined(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Reads paths for a specific RFP project and joins them into one scalar string.

member.name: M:PreparedArtifactPaths.PreparedArtifactPathsReader.GetTconFilePath(System.String)
member.summary: Builds the TCON prepared bin handoff file path.

member.name: M:PreparedArtifactPaths.PreparedArtifactPathsReader.ReadTcon(System.String)
member.summary: Reads the prepared TCON bin path.

member.name: M:PreparedArtifactPaths.PreparedArtifactPathsReader.GetTddiFilePath(System.String)
member.summary: Builds the TDDI prepared lua handoff file path.

member.name: M:PreparedArtifactPaths.PreparedArtifactPathsReader.ReadTddi(System.String)
member.summary: Reads the prepared TDDI lua path.
